name: Genovate Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
summary: Genovate Biotechnology Co., Ltd. operates as a specialty pharmaceutical company in Taiwan. It offers central nervous system drugs, cardiovascular system drugs, musculoskeletal system drugs, immune preparation drugs, anti-infective agents, anticancer drugs, anti-viral drugs, respiratory drugs, genitourinary system drugs, and gastrointestinal drugs. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Hsinchu, Taiwan.
